label.description: The label used to identify the button for active-state tracking.

value.description:
The range value. Specifies how far back from the end of the data to zoom.

- { unit, step } — A calendar interval from the end of the data (e.g., { unit: 'month', step: 3 } for 3 months). - [start, end] — An absolute date range, or a range between two ordinal (band/point) axis values. - (params) => { start, end } — A function that receives axis context (scaleType, data, domain) and returns zoom percentages (0-100). - null — Resets zoom to show all data.

axisId.description:
The axis ID to apply the range to.
Defaults to the first x-axis with zoom enabled.

render.description: A function to customize the rendering of the component.
